one_time_description: Adelaide wind project one-time revenue of $1,500,000 in current year; prior year included $18,513,445 Clench defalcation specific claim settlement
economic_notes: Band operates investments in three wind energy projects: Giiwedin Noodin FN Energy Corporation, 2401077 Ontario Inc., and 2479793 Ontario Inc. Net investment in energy projects totals $27,413,755. Net earnings from investment in energy projects was $6,642,170 in 2022. Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership investment also held. Portfolio investments at cost with market value of $29,763,367.
notes: Fiscal year is 2022, not 2024. Three government business enterprises (Chippewa Industrial Developments Ltd., Ojibwe Legends Trading Company Ltd., Ojibwe Filters and Industrial Supplies Ltd.) accounted for on modified equity basis. Three energy project corporations also held. Prior year included large one-time Clench defalcation settlement of $18,513,445 which inflated prior year revenue and surplus significantly. Current year includes Adelaide wind project one-time revenue of $1,500,000 and net earnings from energy investments of $6,642,170. Schedule of remuneration not included in provided text; council honoraria of $163,794 noted in expenses. ISC funding calculated as Grant + Fixed + Set contributions from consolidated statement. Total government transfers includes ISC, Health Canada, CMHC, Province of Ontario, Southern First Nations Secretariat, Union of Ontario Indians, Stepping Stones, Kinomaadswin Education Body, Southwest Ontario Aboriginal Health Access Centre. OSR calculated as total revenue minus total government transfers. Deferred revenue increased significantly to $9,663,946. Net financial assets of $80,476,966 is positive. Long-term debt includes CMHC housing loans and RBC loan for Romney project.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
